title: Off-Grid Electricity Provider
key_provision: Creates 'off-grid electricity provider' category; entities generating/transmitting/distributing/selling electricity NOT connected to existing grid are NOT public utilities; exempt from Title XXXIV (PUC oversight); loss of exemption if grid connection made; cannot use public rights-of-way
connection_to_data_act: Structural blueprint for DATA Act CREU category — identical islanding requirement, utility exemption, and loss-of-exemption trigger
